targets.queryText: SELECT twr_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT twr_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT attribution_income_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT attribution_income_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT attribution_price_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT attribution_price_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT twr_12m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT twr_12m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, attribution_income_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, attribution_income_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl_usd, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY unrealized_pnl DESC LIMIT 10;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl_usd, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY unrealized_pnl DESC LIMIT 10;

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl_usd, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY unrealized_pnl ASC LIMIT 10;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl_usd, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY unrealized_pnl ASC LIMIT 10;
